arts.ttl: Alexander Isak's Newcastle United absence explained as star misses Liverpool clash
arts.sum: UNITED: Pope, Livramento, Schar, Burn, Hall; Tonali, Bruno, Willock; Murphy, Wilson, Gordon Tonali went in the engine room alongside Joe Willock and Bruno Guimaraes while Wilson was in a three-man attack with Jacob Murphy and Anthony Gordon either side.

arts.ttl: Alexander Isak is OUT of Newcastle's clash with Liverpool - as forward suffers injury less than three weeks before Carabao Cup final
arts.sum: Alexander Isak has been ruled out of Newcastle's crunch game with Liverpool with 'a slight groin issue', the club have said.

arts.sum: Liverpool are reportedly among the clubs eyeing up a surprise transfer swoop for Marseille forward and former Manchester United youngster Mason Greenwood.
